ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "covidhub_baseline" INTEGER /* Forecast from the COVIDhub-baseline model */,
  "cu_select" INTEGER /* Forecast from the CU-select model */,
  "gt_deepcovid" INTEGER /* Forecast from the GT-DeepCOVID model */,
  "jhuapl_bucky" INTEGER /* Forecast from the JHUAPL-Bucky model */,
  "jhuapl_gecko" INTEGER /* Forecast from the JHUAPL-Gecko model */,
  "karlen_pypm" INTEGER /* Forecast from the Karlen-pypm model */,
  "mobs_gleam_covid" INTEGER /* Forecast from the MOBS-GLEAM_COVID model */,
  "usc_si_kJalpha" INTEGER /* Forecast from the USC-SI_kJalpha model */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for this forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* The date for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., cases, hospitalizations, deaths) */,
  "forecast_horizon" TEXT /* The time horizon for the forecast (e.g., 1 week, 2 weeks) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the forecast (e.g., 95%) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* The version of the model used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "accuracy_rating" REAL /* Accuracy rating of the model */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer or organization that created the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the model information was updated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the methodology used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_accuracy" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy record */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being evaluated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that produced the forecast */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the forecast */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the accuracy was recorded */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* The date for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., cases, hospitalizations, deaths) */,
  "forecast_horizon" TEXT /* The time horizon for the forecast (e.g., 1 week, 2 weeks) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the forecast (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_accuracy_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_accuracy_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health official, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the changes made in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that uses the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., days, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
